channel.title: Switchbot on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Switchbot on ExitCode0

item.title: Visualising Temperature and Humidity in Home Assistant with Mini Graph Card
item.description: Visualise SwitchBot temperature and humidity sensors on your Home Assistant dashboard using mini-graph-card from HACS - with colour thresholds and dual axes.

item.title: Home Assistant With ESPhome Bluetooth Proxies
item.description: Extend Home Assistant Bluetooth range using ESPHome wireless proxies on ESP32. Connect BLE sensors like SwitchBot thermometers over WiFi without a USB Bluetooth adapter.
